name: Matt Borja
title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Dynamic Software Engineer with extensive expertise in software development, security, and systems architecture, specializing in supervisory and managerial roles since 2019.

Built, tested, and deployed large application features using deep reasoning agentic AI with governance
Authored and maintained software and infrastructure provenance and documentation using moderate reasoning agentic AI
Conducted security audits on third-party software and produced formal reports using deep reasoning agentic AI with governance

Validated, orchestrated, implemented, and tested migration options distilled from thousands of vendor documentation pages using agentic RAG (second brain) over MCP
Comprehended, reconstructed, and converted massive quantities of existing legacy application logic spanning multiple business contexts using deep reasoning agentic AI

Streamlined proprietary NuGet packages distribution through change and release management

Enabled institution to launch SMS recruitment and engagement campaigns at scale using Twilio Messaging API

Recovered over $40,000 from a vendor breach and independently fulfilled website project requirements
Enhanced user experience by launching a mobile-friendly College Portal — improved login times by 95%

Received DoD Challenge Coin for identifying vulnerabilities in Hack the Pentagon bug bounty program

Accelerated SIS integration delivery to Canvas, setting new standard for course and enrollment data
Identified and patched critical flaw in third-party identity provider; became institution's principal SSO manager
Streamlined computer lab setups including imaging and inventory management
Automated import of over 1,000 student accounts into Active Directory using Visual Basic
